untranslatable_reason: Signal requires specific statistical tests (Augmented Dickey-Fuller for stationarity confirmation, half-life calculation via mean reversion method) and exact thresholds marked AUTHOR_SILENT. These are advanced econometric measures not available in the allowed indicator set. The mean-reversion logic has been approximated using price-to-SMA crossovers as a proxy, but this does not capture the core stationarity and half-life requirements.
translation_notes: This is a best-effort approximation only. The original signal requires: (1) ADF stationarity test - not available as an indicator; (2) Half-life calculation - requires time-series decomposition not in allowed set; (3) Exact deviation thresholds - marked AUTHOR_SILENT so unmeasurable. Substituted with simple mean-reversion proxy: long when price deviates above SMA_20, exit on reversion below SMA_20. For bidirectional context-dependent trading, entry/exit logic reverses for short positions. Actual implementation requires external statistical validation before deployment.
